ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tape_drives" (
  "drive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tape drive model */,
  "drive_model" TEXT /* Model name of the tape drive */,
  "native_capacity" TEXT /* Native storage capacity of the tape drive */,
  "data_rate" TEXT /* Data transfer rate of the tape drive */,
  "cartridge_load_time" TEXT /* Time required to load a cartridge into the tape drive */,
  "tape_size" TEXT /* Size of the tape used in the drive */,
  "expected_mtbf" TEXT /* Expected Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF) of the tape drive */,
  "power_needed" TEXT /* Power requirements for the tape drive */,
  "typical_price" TEXT /* Typical price of the tape drive */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the tape drive was released */,
  "discontinuation_date" TEXT /* Date the tape drive was discontinued (if applicable) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the tape drive */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line the tape drive belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tape_drives_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the warehouse */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "drive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tape drive model */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the tape drive in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the tape drive */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the tape drive reaches the reorder point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_drive_id FOREIGN KEY ("drive_id") REFERENCES tape_drives ("drive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the customer belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the customer belongs to */,
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account manager assigned to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_account_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_manager_id") REFERENCES account_managers ("account_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_managers" (
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account manager */,
  "account_manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the account manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the account manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the account manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used by the customer */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "drive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tape drive model */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the tape drive in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the tape drive in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal for the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_drive_id FOREIGN KEY ("drive_id") REFERENCES tape_drives ("drive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse from which the order is shipped */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used for the shipment */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, warehouse manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., orders, inventory, customers) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the system was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the period */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders for the period */,
  "best_selling_drive" TEXT /* Model of the best-selling tape drive */,
  "worst_selling_drive" TEXT /* Model of the worst-selling tape drive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order for which feedback is provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the feedback from the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
